title: Information Technology
description: Introduces fundamental of IT concepts, including hardware, software, networking, and bascic computer literacy skills. Covers operating systems, office productivity tools.

title: Networking & Web Designing in Business
description: Explores the fundamentals of networking and web design in a business context. Covers network protocols, web development technologies, and their applications in modern business environments.

title: Mobile App Development
description: Provides a comprehensive introduction to mobile application development using React Native. Covers core concepts, UI design, state management, and deployment for both iOS and Android platforms.

title: Computer-Based Information Management
description: Introduces fundamental concepts of database systems, including data modeling, relational databases, SQL, and database design principles. Emphasizes practical applications in information management.
